trial.Description: Trial index indicating the order in which the trials were presented, ranging from 1 to 10.

video_id_presented.Description: Identifier of the video stimulus presented in the corresponding trial. The video IDs match those listed in Supplementary Table 1.

SAM_valence.Description: Self-reported valence rating using the Self-Assessment Manikin (SAM). Rated on a 9-point scale ranging from 1 (Very Negative) to 9 (Very Positive), with 5 representing a Neutral affective state.

SAM_arousal.Description: Self-reported arousal rating using the Self-Assessment Manikin (SAM). Rated on a 9-point scale ranging from 1 (Calm) to 9 (Excited).

Description: Discrete emotion responses assessed using the PrEmo.
Values range from 1 to 16, corresponding to the following emotional categories:
15=Shame, 16=None of these. Multiple selections are allowed.

Video_Status.Description: Response indicating whether the participant had prior experience watching the presented video. A value of 1 indicates Yes, and 2 indicates No.

Description: Selected highlight moments from the video stimulus. Values range from 1 to 7, where
1 to 6 correspond to screenshots captured sequentially in temporal order during the video,
and 7 indicates 'None of these'. Multiple selections are allowed.
